'''ngachara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svarita|svarita]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svarita|svarita]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngachara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæchæræth|ngæchæræth]] || [[word:ngæchæræj|ngæchæræj]] || [[word:ngæchæræsh|ngæchæræsh]] || [[word:ngæchæræ|ngæchæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachacharath|ngachacharath]] || [[word:ngachacharaj|ngachacharaj]] || [[word:ngachacharash|ngachacharash]] || [[word:ngachachara|ngachachara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngacharath|ngacharath]] || [[word:ngacharaj|ngacharaj]] || [[word:ngacharash|ngacharash]] || [[word:ngachara|ngachara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachafrath|ngachafrath]] || [[word:ngachafraj|ngachafraj]] || [[word:ngachafrash|ngachafrash]] || [[word:ngachafraf|ngachafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngacharatha|ngacharatha]] || [[word:ngacharaja|ngacharaja]] || [[word:ngacharasha|ngacharasha]] || [[word:ngacharaka|ngacharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngacharath|ngacharath]] || [[word:ngacharaj|ngacharaj]] || [[word:ngacharash|ngacharash]] || [[word:ngachara|ngachara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngacharathal|ngacharathal]] || [[word:ngacharajal|ngacharajal]] || [[word:ngacharashal|ngacharashal]] || [[word:ngacharakal|ngacharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngacharathatha|ngacharathatha]] || [[word:ngacharajaja|ngacharajaja]] || [[word:ngacharashasha|ngacharashasha]] || [[word:ngacharaka|ngacharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngacharathan|ngacharathan]] || [[word:ngacharajan|ngacharajan]] || [[word:ngacharashan|ngacharashan]] || [[word:ngacharakan|ngacharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngacharathaoro|ngacharathaoro]] || [[word:ngacharajaoro|ngacharajaoro]] || [[word:ngacharashaoro|ngacharashaoro]] || [[word:ngacharakaoro|ngacharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
